rows.type: Collection 3.0 双语 英文+中文
Collection 3.0 三语 英文+中文+马来语

scoring_matrix.what_we_tested: Clarity, warmth, prosody, naturalness, artifact/noise tolerance
scoring_matrix.evidence: Deepgram transcript evidence plus acoustic/VAD context where available
scoring_matrix.good: Human-like tone, clear pronunciation, natural variation
scoring_matrix.bad: Synthetic timbre, rushed reading, flat affect, hard-to-understand audio

scoring_matrix.what_we_tested: Greeting, identity/consent, purpose clarity, first-turn smoothness
scoring_matrix.evidence: Opening transcript turns and first-word timing context
scoring_matrix.good: Clear caller identity, concise purpose, low friction
scoring_matrix.bad: Confusing intro, missing disclosure, abrupt or delayed start

scoring_matrix.what_we_tested: Conversational pacing, listening behavior, answer relevance, script flexibility
scoring_matrix.evidence: Deepgram utterances, Gemini text scoring, red flags
scoring_matrix.good: Adaptive, concise, responds to customer intent
scoring_matrix.bad: Monologue, repeats script, ignores objections or context

scoring_matrix.what_we_tested: Turn gaps, dead air, slow response, perceived wait time
scoring_matrix.evidence: Deepgram timestamps and acoustic timing signals
scoring_matrix.good: Crisp responses without overlap or long silence
scoring_matrix.bad: Long dead air, robotic pauses, interrupting too early

scoring_matrix.what_we_tested: Barge-in handling, no-answer/empty-turn handling, fallback behavior, risk/compliance issues
scoring_matrix.evidence: Transcript events, red flags, exception notes
scoring_matrix.good: Recovers gracefully and handles edge cases
scoring_matrix.bad: Talks over user, loops, fails silently, mishandles risk

test_flow.detail: Curated 32-file index, not recursive folder scan
Deepgram transcription with chunking from analyzer config
Per-file JSON/HTML, aggregate JSON/CSV, source-aligned report data

likes_dislikes.like: Curated index prevents duplicate Airudder/Feishu media counting.
likes_dislikes.dont_like: Runtime still depends on remote STT and LLM availability.

likes_dislikes.like: Baseline deltas are matched by suite and file name.
likes_dislikes.dont_like: Model-change deltas are evaluator deltas, not product regressions by themselves.
